name: Tunnel
items_start: Massive stone door with a SAPPHIRE set into it
hints: There is a knife and a massive door with a sapphire. The door may be openable.
GET KNIFE. The sapphire in the door is important - you may need to remove it somehow.
The sapphire can be pried from the door. The knife and door are both important for the puzzle.
GET KNIFE. Work on removing the sapphire from the door. WEST returns to the chapel.
notes: Tunnel east of the chapel with a bloody knife and a massive stone door containing a sapphire. The sapphire needs to be retrieved. WEST returns to the chapel.
